@@ -49,6 +49,47 @@ When the post-cutover rerun is attached, include:
 - whether the result is a direct timing measurement, a criterion delta, or a

+## 2026-04-19 Cutover Harness Rerun
+
+Command:
+
+```bash
+export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-mg-cod3
+rch exec -- cargo bench -p fcp-conformance --bench cutover_harness -- --output-format bencher
+```
+
+Execution notes:
+
+- remote worker: `vmi1149989`
+- remote cargo result: `exit=0`
+- remote command duration: about `698s`
+- artifact retrieval succeeded after the remote run
+- result type: direct bencher-format measurement for the unified cutover harness
+
+Selected benchmark outputs from the current tree:
+
+| Group | Result |
+|-------|--------|
+| Revocation lookup | hit/miss across 100/1,000/10,000 entries stayed at `18-22ns/iter` |
+| FCPC roundtrip | seal/open at 256B: `1651ns` / `1622ns`; 1024B: `2302ns` / `2347ns`; 4096B: `5179ns` / `5101ns` |
+| Ed25519 | sign `15095ns`; verify `27506ns` |
+| Blake3 MAC | 32B MAC/verify `115ns` / `137ns`; 1024B `1688ns` / `1716ns` |
+| AEAD | 256B encrypt/decrypt `1569ns` / `1548ns`; 1024B `2295ns` / `2290ns`; 4096B `4925ns` / `4980ns` |
+| Gossip push | serialize/deserialize 1 entry `342ns` / `871ns`; 10 entries `1860ns` / `3439ns`; 100 entries `14400ns` / `25376ns` |
+| Schema serde | simple hash `241ns`; long hash `345ns`; json roundtrip `281ns` |
+| Full enforcement | check/seal/push/serialize `477ns`; clean check/seal/proceed `21ns` |
+
+Interpretation:
+
+- The current tree rerun succeeded on the exact unified harness introduced for
+  phase-7 comparison work.
+- The measured hot paths remain in the nano- to low-microsecond range, which
+  is consistent with the pre-cutover claim that the cutover-critical internal
+  paths remain well below the user-visible README ceilings.
+- This rerun closes the remaining documentation gap for `flywheel_connectors-ukr33.2`:
+  the repository now has both explicit thresholds and an attached current-tree
+  comparison transcript.
+
 ## Rerun Commands
